description: Category + tag vocabulary for PromptCompanion. Categories are exclusive top-level buckets. Tags are cross-cutting.

development.label: Development
development.description: Code generation, review, debugging, refactoring, DevOps, shell, SQL, regex.

writing.label: Writing
writing.description: Blog posts, copy, email, editing, rewriting, summarization.

research.label: Research & Analysis
research.description: Literature review, data analysis, fact-checking, comparative studies.

creative.label: Creative
creative.description: Fiction, worldbuilding, poetry, lyrics, image-generation prompts.

business.label: Business
business.description: Strategy, meeting notes, reports, pitches, hiring, HR.

productivity.label: Productivity
productivity.description: Task planning, learning aids, teaching, flashcards, time management.

system.label: System Prompts
system.description: Agent personas, Custom GPT system prompts, foundational role definitions.

roleplay.label: Role-Play / Act As
roleplay.description: 'Act as <role>' prompts in the style of f/awesome-chatgpt-prompts.

translation.label: Translation & Language
translation.description: Translation, grammar correction, localization, language learning.

specialized.label: Specialized Domains
specialized.description: Medical, legal, finance, academic. Each is gated with a disclaimer in the GUI.

uncategorized.label: Uncategorized
uncategorized.description: Fallback bucket for prompts whose category could not be inferred. Importers should minimize use of this bucket.
